title: Time to Shweep!
body:
Every time you forget to sleep the game reminds you to do it in the most obnoxious irritating way. I tried to make it just a little bit more pleasant by using the sweet voice of BdoubleO. 

All this pack does is replaces the swoop#.ogg sound, that plays when phantoms spawn or attack you. Other phantoms sounds are unchanged.

"the best resource pack ever made" ©️ 🐐 Docm77
